abilities.name: 복슬복슬
abilities.description: 상대로부터 받은 접촉하는 기술의 데미지를 반감시키지만 불꽃타입 기술의 데미지는 2배가 된다.

flavorTexts.text: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.
This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.
